---
title: "Publications"
---
## Peer-reviewed publications

```{=html}
<style>
.pub-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding-left: 0;
  margin-left: 0;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.pub-list li {
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.9rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
}

.pub-title {
  font-weight: 600;
}

.pub-meta {
  color: var(--bs-secondary-color);
}

.pub-doi {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}

.pub-doi a {
  text-decoration: none;
}

.pub-doi a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<ol class="pub-list">
  <li>
    Wilkins, L., Perry, K., Calo, M., &amp; Huynh, M. (2026).
    <span class="pub-title">Can a Failure-Focused Workshop Decouple Competence-Contingent Enjoyment? Evidence from First-Year University Students.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of University Teaching and Learning Practice, 23(1).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.53761/1hhpn859">10.53761/1hhpn859</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Moriarty, B., Watts, D., Gastin, P., Weakley, J., Huynh, M., &amp; James, L. (2026).
    <span class="pub-title">Practices and Perceptions of Resistance Training Load Quantification.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Physiology and Performance, 9 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1123/ijspp.2025-0571">10.1123/ijspp.2025-0571</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Batty, L. M., Huynh, M., Webster, K. E., Vassileff, N., Spiers, J. G., Klemm, H. J., ... Feller, J. A. (2026).
    <span class="pub-title">Higher Day of Surgery Serum Matrix Metalloproteinase-3 Concentration Is Associated With Failing to Achieve the KOOS-4 and IKDC Patient Acceptable Symptom State at 6 Years After ACL Reconstruction.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">American Journal of Sports Medicine, 54(4), 796–807.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/03635465261416921">10.1177/03635465261416921</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Busuttil, N., Roberts, A., Dunn, M., Huynh, M., &amp; Middleton, K. (2026).
    <span class="pub-title">Perceptions and Practices of Accredited Tennis Coaches When Teaching Foundational Grip Development.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">In B. Gilic &amp; A. Fusco (Eds.), Human Performance and Health in Sport and Exercise, 1st ed., pp. 81–92. MDPI Books.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/books978-3-7258-6527-7">10.3390/books978-3-7258-6527-7</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Walsh, E., Leota, J., Huynh, M., Liddle, S. K., Drummond, S. P. A., &amp; Facer-Childs, E. R. (2026).
    <span class="pub-title">Sleep and Circadian Interventions to Improve Athletes’ Mental Health, Mood and Well-Being: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Sports Medicine, 15 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s40279-025-02387-z">10.1007/s40279-025-02387-z</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Tissera, K., Shorter, K. A., Huynh, M., &amp; Benson, A. C. (2026).
    <span class="pub-title">Reliability and validity of the fulltrack AI application to determine cricket bowling line and length compared to 3D motion capture.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Sports Biomechanics, 25(1), 105–121.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/14763141.2024.2381108">10.1080/14763141.2024.2381108</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    James, L. P., Kelly, V. G., Weakley, J., Johnston, R. D., &amp; Huynh, M. (2026).
    <span class="pub-title">Does Maximal Strength or Speed-Strength Have Stronger Associations with Performance Indicators in the Rugby Football Codes? A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Sports Medicine, 56(1).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s40279-025-02342-y">10.1007/s40279-025-02342-y</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Lyristakis, P., Wundersitz, D., Cousins, S., Huynh, M., Zadow, E., &amp; Gordon, B. A. (2026).
    <span class="pub-title">The Influence of Individual Resistance Training Variables on Muscle Strength: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Sports Medicine.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s40279-026-02432-5">10.1007/s40279-026-02432-5</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Masismadi, N. A., Wylde, M., Tan, C. Z. X., Gastin, P. B., Huynh, M., &amp; Suppiah, H. T. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">A framework for sporting success. Definitions and measures from research on sports featured in the 2014–2028 Olympic games: A scoping review.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Science and Coaching, 17 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/17479541251404425">10.1177/17479541251404425</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    James, L. P., Talpey, S. W., Stutter, L. R., Häkkinen, K., &amp; Huynh, M. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">The Sensitivity of Isometric Versus Ballistic Measures of Rapid Force Production Following Ballistic Speed–Strength Training: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Physiology and Performance, 20(12), 1625–1635.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1123/ijspp.2025-0297">10.1123/ijspp.2025-0297</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Binte Masismadi, N. A., Wylde, M., Chia, E., Gastin, P., Huynh, M., &amp; Suppiah, H. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">“Berjaya, Singapura”: How Do We Perceive Success in Youth and Senior Sport?</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Motor Learning and Development, 1 page.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1123/jmld.2025-0131">10.1123/jmld.2025-0131</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Batty, L. M., Huynh, M., Webster, K. E., Vassileff, N., Spiers, J. G., Klemm, H. J., ... Feller, J. A. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">An Exploration of Outlier Patients in Systemic Biomarkers of Chondral Metabolism After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">American Journal of Sports Medicine, 53(13), 3078–3088.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/03635465251383532">10.1177/03635465251383532</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Batty, L. M., Huynh, M., Webster, K. E., Vassileff, N., Spiers, J., Klemm, H. J., ... Feller, J. A. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">Systemic Biomarkers of Chondral Metabolism and Matrix Remodeling After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Prospective Study.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">American Journal of Sports Medicine, 1–10.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/03635465251376616">10.1177/03635465251376616</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Ball, J., Huynh, M., &amp; Varley, M. C. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">Associations between individual and balanced team performance and soccer match outcomes.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Performance Analysis in Sport, 18 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/24748668.2025.2567757">10.1080/24748668.2025.2567757</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Wirtz, S., Huynh, M., Smith, M., Webster, K. E., &amp; MacMahon, C. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">Are You as Tired as I Am? Mental Fatigue Perception in Female Australian Rules Football Athletes Over a Season: The Influence of Personality.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Physiology and Performance, 7 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1123/ijspp.2025-0062">10.1123/ijspp.2025-0062</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Binte Masismadi, N. A., Wylde, M., Huynh, M., Gastin, P. B., Chia, E., &amp; Suppiah, H. T. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">Utilising competition participation history at youth age to forecast dropout risk and sporting success likelihoods in competitive swimming.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Science and Coaching, 12 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/17479541251372398">10.1177/17479541251372398</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Wilkins, L., Gorman, A. D., Merry, S., Huynh, M., &amp; Kittel, A. (n.d.).
    <span class="pub-title">Virtual Reality vs Traditional Videogames: Which is More Effective at Enhancing Adolescent Intentions and Attitudes Towards Sport?</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-7049862/v1">10.21203/rs.3.rs-7049862/v1</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Gardiner, C., Weakley, J., Burke, L. M., Roach, G. D., Sargent, C., Maniar, N., Huynh, M., &amp; Halson, S. L. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">The effect of alcohol on subsequent sleep in healthy adults: A systematic review and meta-analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Sleep Medicine Reviews, 80, 15 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.smrv.2024.102030">10.1016/j.smrv.2024.102030</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Guppy, R., Huynh, M., Davids, C., &amp; Varley, M. C. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">Understanding the Context in Which Australian Footballers Sprint During Match-Play.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research, 39(5), e668–e675.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1519/JSC.0000000000005047">10.1519/JSC.0000000000005047</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Epifano, D., Ryan, S., Clarke, A., Huynh, M., Anderson, H., &amp; Middleton, K. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">Comparing tibial accelerations between delivery and follow-through foot strikes in cricket pace bowling.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Sports Biomechanics, 24(3).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/14763141.2022.2136582">10.1080/14763141.2022.2136582</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Ball, J., Huynh, M., &amp; Varley, M. C. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">Comparing player rating systems as a metric for assessing individual performance in soccer.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Sports Sciences, 11 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/02640414.2025.2471208">10.1080/02640414.2025.2471208</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Shorter, K. A., Tissera, K., Huynh, M., &amp; Benson, A. C. (2025).
    <span class="pub-title">A comparison of Fulltrack AI application as an alternative to radar gun measured cricket ball delivery speed.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Science and Coaching, 20(1).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/17479541241284714">10.1177/17479541241284714</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Wilkins, L., Dowsett, R., Zaborski, Z., Scoles, L., Kinrade, N., Huynh, M., &amp; Allen, P. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">The Emotional Experiences of Fantasy Sports Participants.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Sport Marketing Quarterly, 33(4), 339–378.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.32731/smq.334.122024.04">10.32731/smq.334.122024.04</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    James, L. P., Davids, C. J., Talpey, S. W., Huynh, M., Lidums, M., Driller, M. W., ... Gastin, P. B. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">Global Industry Perspectives on Postgraduate Strength and Conditioning Degrees: An Exploratory Factor Analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Physiology and Performance, 19(12), 1426–1433.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1123/IJSPP.2024-0139">10.1123/IJSPP.2024-0139</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Slattery, P., Wheat, J., Lizama, L. E. C., Gastin, P., Dascombe, B., Huynh, M., &amp; Middleton, K. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">The repeatability of stride time variability, regularity, and long-range correlations.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Gait and Posture, 114, 257–262.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.gaitpost.2024.10.014">10.1016/j.gaitpost.2024.10.014</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Stutter, L. R., Huynh, M., Driller, M. W., Davids, C. J., &amp; James, L. P. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">Pairwise Comparison of Heavy Dynamic Strength and Fast Dynamic Strength Interventions on Sprint Performance: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research, 38(9), 1675–1686.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1519/jsc.0000000000004839">10.1519/jsc.0000000000004839</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    James, L., Davids, C., Talpey, S., Huynh, M., Lidums, M., Driller, M., ... Gastin, P. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">Strength &amp; Conditioning Employer Perceptions Survey: An Interactive Dashboard.</span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Busuttil, N. A., Roberts, A. H., Dunn, M., Huynh, M., &amp; Middleton, K. J. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">Perceptions and Practices of Accredited Tennis Coaches When Teaching Foundational Grip Development.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Applied Sciences, 14(16), 12 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/app14167127">10.3390/app14167127</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Vickery-Howe, D. M., Dascombe, B. J., Clarke, A. C., Drain, J. R., Huynh, M., &amp; Middleton, K. J. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">The test–retest reliability of physiological and perceptual responses during treadmill load carriage.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">European Journal of Applied Physiology, 124, 2093–2100.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00421-024-05435-0">10.1007/s00421-024-05435-0</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Thurlow, F., Huynh, M., Townshend, A., McLaren, S. J., James, L. P., Taylor, J. M., ... Weakley, J. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">The Effects of Repeated-Sprint Training on Physical Fitness and Physiological Adaptation in Athletes: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Sports Medicine, 54(4), 953–974.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s40279-023-01959-1">10.1007/s40279-023-01959-1</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Oberholster, C. K., Taylor, C. J., Huynh, M., &amp; Gordon, B. A. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">The immediate and lasting balance outcomes of clinical falls-prevention programs: A non-randomised study.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">PLOS ONE, 19(3), 17 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0299146">10.1371/journal.pone.0299146</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Leabeater, A., Clarke, A., James, L., Huynh, M., &amp; Driller, M. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">Under the Gun: Percussive Massage Therapy and Physical and Perceptual Recovery in Active Adults.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Athletic Training, 59(3), 310–316.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.4085/1062-6050-0041.23">10.4085/1062-6050-0041.23</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Tissera, K., Orth, D., Huynh, M., &amp; Benson, A. C. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">A coach's perspective on augmented feedback and technology in cricket.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Science and Coaching, 19(2), 562–572.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/17479541231213540">10.1177/17479541231213540</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    James, L. P., Weakley, J., Comfort, P., &amp; Huynh, M. (2024).
    <span class="pub-title">The Relationship Between Isometric and Dynamic Strength Following Resistance Training: A Systematic Review, Meta-Analysis, and Level of Agreement.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Physiology and Performance, 19(1), 2–12.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1123/ijspp.2023-0066">10.1123/ijspp.2023-0066</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Swart, T., Shandley, K., Huynh, M., Brown, C. M., Austin, D. W., &amp; Bhowmik, J. (2023).
    <span class="pub-title">Pregnancy complications and their association with postpartum depression symptoms: a retrospective study.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Australian Journal of Psychology, 75(1), 7 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/00049530.2023.2247088">10.1080/00049530.2023.2247088</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Suppiah, H., Paul, G., Grant, M., Driller, M., James, L., Huynh, M., ... Perry, K. (2023).
    <span class="pub-title">All You Need is Love for Data: Enhancing Practicum Experiences for Sport and Exercise Science Students through Learning Analytics.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Proceedings of the 2023 ASCILITE Conference: People, Partnerships and Pedagogies, 6 pages.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.14742/apubs.2023.661">10.14742/apubs.2023.661</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Coleman, J. L., Huynh, M., &amp; Middleton, K. J. (2023).
    <span class="pub-title">Number of trials necessary to achieve a representative performance of accuracy and timing during combat shooting.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Scandinavian Journal of Medicine and Science in Sports, 33(10), 2039–2045.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/sms.14439">10.1111/sms.14439</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Teece, A. R., Beaven, M., Huynh, M., Argus, C. K., Gill, N., &amp; Driller, M. W. (2023).
    <span class="pub-title">Nap to perform? Match-day napping on perceived match performance in professional rugby union athletes.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Sports Science and Coaching, 18(2), 462–469.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1177/17479541221084146">10.1177/17479541221084146</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Leabeater, A., Clarke, A., James, L., Huynh, M., &amp; Driller, M. (2023).
    <span class="pub-title">Evaluating the acute effect of compression socks for recovery between exercise bouts.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Human Sport and Exercise, 18(4), 820–832.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.14198/jhse.2023.184.07">10.14198/jhse.2023.184.07</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Tissera, K., Orth, D., Huynh, M., &amp; Benson, A. C. (2022).
    <span class="pub-title">The impact of augmented feedback and technology on learning and teaching cricket skill: A systematic review with meta-analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">PLOS ONE, 17(12).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0279121">10.1371/journal.pone.0279121</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Whitely, A., Shandley, K., Huynh, M., Brown, C. M., Austin, D. W., &amp; Bhowmik, J. (2022).
    <span class="pub-title">Brief Report: Pregnancy, Birth and Infant Feeding Practices: A Survey-Based Investigation into Risk Factors for Autism Spectrum Disorder.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Autism and Developmental Disorders, 52(11), 5072–5078.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s10803-021-05348-3">10.1007/s10803-021-05348-3</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Leabeater, A. J., James, L. P., Huynh, M., Vleck, V., Plews, D. J., &amp; Driller, M. W. (2022).
    <span class="pub-title">All the gear: The prevalence and perceived effectiveness of recovery strategies used by triathletes.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Performance Enhancement and Health, 10(4).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.peh.2022.100235">10.1016/j.peh.2022.100235</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Kee, L., Huynh, M., Xanthos, P., Davids, C., &amp; James, L. (2022).
    <span class="pub-title">The Determinants of Student Attrition in an Undergraduate Sport and Exercise Science Degree.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Sport Science and Education, 7(1), 7–16.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.26740/jossae.v7n1.p7-16">10.26740/jossae.v7n1.p7-16</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Nguyen, V. H., Sukunesan, S., &amp; Huynh, M. (2022).
    <span class="pub-title">Web scraping Instagram Pre and During Covid-19: Examining customer engagement on Australian SMEs accounts.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Australasian Journal of Information Systems, 26.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.3127/ajis.v26i0.3447">10.3127/ajis.v26i0.3447</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Suppiah, H. T., Ng, E. L., Wee, J., Taim, B. C., Huynh, M., Gastin, P. B., ... Lee, J. K. W. (2021).
    <span class="pub-title">Hydration status and fluid replacement strategies of high-performance adolescent athletes: An application of machine learning to distinguish hydration characteristics.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Nutrients, 13(11).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/nu13114073">10.3390/nu13114073</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Hunter, J. R., Gordon, B. A., Huynh, M., &amp; Benson, A. C. (2021).
    <span class="pub-title">Physical Activity Participation after a 16-Week Supervised Workplace Exercise RCT with a 15-Month Follow-Up.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Occupational and Environmental Medicine, 63(8), E526–E532.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1097/JOM.0000000000002272">10.1097/JOM.0000000000002272</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Sukunesan, S., Huynh, M., &amp; Sharp, G. (2021).
    <span class="pub-title">Examining the pro-eating disorders community on Twitter via the hashtag #proana: Statistical modeling approach.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">JMIR Mental Health, 8(7).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.2196/24340">10.2196/24340</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Nguyen, V. H., Sukunesan, S., &amp; Huynh, M. (2021).
    <span class="pub-title">Analyzing Australian SME Instagram Engagement via Web Scraping.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Pacific Asia Journal of the Association for Information Systems, 13(2), 11–43.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.17705/1pais.13202">10.17705/1pais.13202</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Edward, K. L., Galletti, A., &amp; Huynh, M. (2020).
    <span class="pub-title">Enhancing communication with family members in the intensive care unit: a mixed-methods study.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Critical Care Nurse, 40(6), 23–32.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.4037/ccn2020595">10.4037/ccn2020595</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Olasoji, M., Huynh, M., Edward, K.-L., Willetts, G., &amp; Garvey, L. (2020).
    <span class="pub-title">Undergraduate student nurses' experience of mental health simulation pre-clinical placement: A pre/post-test survey.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Mental Health Nursing, 29(5), 820–830.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/inm.12715">10.1111/inm.12715</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Sukunesan, S., Huynh, M., &amp; Sharp, G. (n.d.).
    <span class="pub-title">Examining the Pro-Eating Disorders Community on Twitter Via the Hashtag #proana: Statistical Modeling Approach (Preprint).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.2196/preprints.24340">10.2196/preprints.24340</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Muir, S., Tirlea, L., Elphinstone, B., &amp; Huynh, M. (2020).
    <span class="pub-title">Promoting classroom engagement through the use of an online student response system: a mixed methods analysis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Statistics Education, 28(1), 25–31.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/10691898.2020.1730733">10.1080/10691898.2020.1730733</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Simmons, M. L., McEwan, T. E., Purcell, R., &amp; Huynh, M. (2019).
    <span class="pub-title">The Abusive Behaviour by Children-Indices (ABC-I): a Measure to Discriminate between Normative and Abusive Child Behaviour.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Family Violence, 34(7), 663–676.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s10896-019-00071-1">10.1007/s10896-019-00071-1</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Oh, L. C. W., Lau, K. K. P., Devapalasundaram, A., Buchan, K., Kuganesan, A., &amp; Huynh, M. (2019).
    <span class="pub-title">Efficacy of Fine Focal Spot Technique in CT Graphy of Neck.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">British Journal of Radiology, 92(1100), 1–6.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1259/bjr.20190083">10.1259/bjr.20190083</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Wilson, A., &amp; Huynh, M. (2020).
    <span class="pub-title">Mentor–Mentee Relationships as Anchors for Pre Service Teachers’ Coping on Professional Placement.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Mentoring and Coaching in Education, 9(1).</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1108/IJMCE-04-2019-0052">10.1108/IJMCE-04-2019-0052</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Huynh, M., &amp; Baglin, J. (2017).
    <span class="pub-title">Teaching Statistics through Data Investigations in Australian Secondary Schools: An Island-based Pilot Project.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Innovation in Science and Mathematics Education, 25(1), 49–64.</span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Huynh, M., &amp; Marshall, K. (2016).
    <span class="pub-title">Training Badminton Players and Knowing When to Throw in the Tau.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Proceedings of the 13th Australasian Conference on Mathematics and Computers in Sport.</span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Huynh, M., Baglin, J., Hart, C., Macgillivray, H., Bulmer, M., Dunn, P., &amp; Marshman, M. (2016).
    <span class="pub-title">Teachers’ Perceptions of Teaching Statistics in Schools Using the Islands.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Proceedings of the 9th Australian Conference on Teaching Statistics, pp. 16–21.</span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Tirlea, L., Huynh, M., &amp; Elphinstone, B. (2016).
    <span class="pub-title">A Pilot Experimental Study Comparing Different Active Learning Strategies for Understanding Sampling.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Proceedings of the 9th Australian Conference on Teaching Statistics, pp. 27–31.</span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Goh, Y. P., Lau, K. K., Low, K., Buchan, K., Oh, L. C. W., Kuganesan, A., &amp; Huynh, M. (2016).
    <span class="pub-title">Fine Focal Spot Size Improves Image Quality in Computed Tomography Abdomen and Pelvis.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">European Radiology, 26(12), 4545–4550.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00330-016-4313-7">10.1007/s00330-016-4313-7</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Oh, L. C. W., Lau, K. K., Devapalasundaram, A., Buchan, K., Ardley, N., &amp; Huynh, M. (2014).
    <span class="pub-title">Efficacy of ‘Fine’ Focal Spot Imaging in CT Abdominal Angiography.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">European Radiology, 24(12), 3010–3016.</span>
    <br><span class="pub-doi">doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00330-014-3368-6">10.1007/s00330-014-3368-6</a></span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Huynh, M., &amp; Baglin, J. (2014).
    <span class="pub-title">Enriching the Mathematics Classroom: A Visit to the Virtual Island.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Proceedings of the 51st Conference of the Mathematical Association of Victoria, pp. 84–93.</span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Huynh, M., Baglin, J., &amp; Bedford, A. (2014).
    <span class="pub-title">Improving the Attitudes of High School Students Towards Statistics: An Island Based Approach.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Proceedings of the Ninth International Conference on Teaching Statistics.</span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Huynh, M., &amp; Bedford, A. (2011).
    <span class="pub-title">Evaluating a computer based skills acquisition trainer to classify badminton players.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">Journal of Sports Science and Medicine, 10(3), 528–533.</span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Huynh, M., &amp; Bedford, A. (2011).
    <span class="pub-title">An analysis of the Skills Acquisition Trainer for Badminton program: exploring the effectiveness of visual based training in sport.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">International Journal of Computer Science in Sport, 10, 5–17.</span>
  </li>

  <li>
    Huynh, M., &amp; Bedford, A. (2011).
    <span class="pub-title">Acquiring and discriminating badminton expertise.</span>
    <span class="pub-meta">In Computer Science in Sport. Shanghai.</span>
  </li>
</ol>
```
